title: Bonsenkitchen Hand Blender, 2 Speeds Immersion Blender Handheld, Stick Blender Electric with Stainless Steel Blade for Making Baby Food, Soups, Sauce, HB3201 (Black)
features: Adjustable Speed: 300W hand blender motor with 2-speed control. Easier to operate, speed up food preparation and give you a unique cooking experience.
High Quality Stainless Steel Blade: The sharp double-edged knife is made of 304 stainless steel, for quick cleaning, the mixing foot (blender attachment) can be detached for cleaning.

Ergonomic Design: Built with an ergonomically designed body with rubberized grip for a secure grip and comfortable blending. And equipped with overheat protection for prevention, take care of your entire cooking journey.

Powerful Smooth Blending: Featuring a 300-Watt high-speed motor and 4 sharp blades, Bonsenkitchen immersion blender blends ingredients quickly—perfect for smoothies, pureed soups, marinades, sauces, juices. Enjoy delicious daily meals effortlessly.
Thoughtful Design: Convenient hanging loop and 1m power cord on the top of the hand mixer, suitable for any kitchen and easy to use.
